text.p: Unfortunately since I returned to Nigeria my wife has been on hospital admission. At the moment, I'm planning to fly her out to India for medical attention. As a consequence, my teaching job itself is suffering. I'm afraid I may not be of assistance this time.

Assalamu alaikum, I just learnt you have returned to Nigeria, so I feel I should welcome you with a problem. I have composed a short story which I intend to, with your support, develop into a novel. But before I do that, I want to have a down -to -earth critical and unsparing assessment of the work by your goodself.

Please, I want to see your intervention. The title of the story is 'THE ROAD TO PERDITION' from Femi Osofisan's 'Leaders on the road to perdition have no ears for the poet'. You may of course suggest a better title. The story is attached. Welcome back to the banana republic.

I hope your return journey was a happy and safe one. I called you on Sunday a few minutes to 10.00 pm, but although the phone rang, you didn't pick the call. So, I thought you must have boarded the plane.

The renovation work on your house is going on smoothly. I shall keep you posted. Please my regards to the members of your family. Thank you once more for being kind and generous to us while in the country. JAZAKALLAHU KHAIRAN.
